title: Terry Towelling Cloth Nappies 100% Cotton Soft Reusable and Absorbent Flat Diapers (Pack of 12, White)
features: Pack of 12 60x60cms WHITEBOTS by Bright Bots Thick & Thirsty 100% Cotton Soft Terry Towelling Squares
Quality Terry Towels. Perfect as reusable nappies, changing mat cover, small towel for baby bath time or topping and tailing.
HIGH QUALITY Terry Squares made ethically in Pakistan to Oeko Tex 100 Standard - UK brand.
MACHINE WASHABLE up to 40c - Warm Gentle Machine Wash, Do Not Bleach
description: Product Description Bright Bots Soft Cotton Nappies These soft baby towelling nappies provide strong absorbency and are suitable for machine washing and tumble drying Machine Washable Bright Bots Terry Squares can be machine washed at 40c and also be tumble dried (prewash before use) Multipurpose Soft Terry Squares Bright Bots Terry Nappies have a variety of uses, from nappies to cleaning cloths. Incredibly useful to have around the house. Bright Colours Add some colour with a choice of three vibrant colour options - white, pink, and blue. Explore the range of Bright Bots products We have a range of cotton squares and nappies for you to explore Bright Bots 12 Pack Towelling Nappies Bright Bots Towelling Nappies (Blue) Bright Bots Towelling Nappies (Pink) Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 107 4.8 out of 5 stars 9 4.7 out of 5 stars 107 Price £24.95 £ 24 . 95 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 Product type 12 Pack 6 Pack (Blue) 6 Pack (Pink) Machine Washable ✓ ✓ ✓

product_details_tab_data.Title: Bright Bots Terry Towelling Cloth Nappies 100% Cotton Soft Reusable and Absorbent Flat Diapers (Pack of 12, White)
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Baby Products › Nappy Changing › Cloth Nappies & Accessories › Cloth Nappies › All-in-One Nappies
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always handle with care to avoid skin irritation. Keep away from eyes and mouth. Not suitable for use with infants who have known allergies to cotton. Always supervise infants and young children when using this product. Dispose of used products responsibly and follow local guidelines for waste disposal.
